title: Megalo's AIO - NeoForge Edition
description: Megalo's Metallurgy, Hoplology, Alloys, Nature and Gastronomy all in one mod
body:
**New Update: Re-Imagined Textures for Metallurgy and Hoplology skillfully created by She's_Long**

I have merged my Mods into an All-In-One (AIO); more will be added gradually.

Megalo's Metallurgy/Hoplology: Adds 50 new Ores to the game, from Aluminium to Zirconium and 4 weapon/tool variants.
Megalo's Alloys: Adds over 170 new metals that can be crafted from the base ores.
Megalo's Nature (WIP): This includes Dendrology/Gastonomy/Horticulture, adding Crops, Trees, Fruit, Vegetables, Meats and Drinks, etc.
Megalo's Technology is a long way off from being made yet.
 

Recipes for Alloys are being written, hopefully, by the next update.

Overworld Spawn:

Aluminium, Calcium, Cinnabar (Mercury), Lead, Magnesium, Nickel, Osmium, Platinum, Silicon, Silver, Sodium, Tin, Titanium, Zinc and Zirconium.

 

Deepslate Spawn:

Antimony, Bismuth, Cadmium, Chromium, Cobalt, Gallium, Iridium, Manganese, Molybdenum, Palladium, Potassium, Ruthenium, Thallium and Tungsten.

 

The Nether Spawn:

Arsenic, Barium, Beryllium, Caesium, Germanium, Hafnium, Indium, Niobium, Phosphorus, Rhenium, Rhodium, Selenium, Technetium and Tellurium.

 

The End Spawn:

Lithium, Rubidium, Scandium, Strontium, Tantalum, Vanadium and Yttrium.

 

Fictional Metals (Ultra Rare):

Coming Soon - Adamantium, Orichalcum, Mithril and many more.

 

Coal, Charcoal, Copper, Iron and Gold now have Dust.

Aluminium, Silver and Titanium make tools and armour.

*The way to make them is completely different from vanilla crafting.

 

== User Ideas ==

If you have any ideas / Suggestions on what to add to Megalo's AIO, please use the official Discord via the link at the bottom of the description.

== Videos = 

Mod reviewers - Please review my Mod, as I would love to know what you think about it. Let me know if you have any ideas on what can be reworked or updated.

 

== Permissions and Other Information ==

Megalo's Mod is free to use in any modpack.

If you want to make add-ons for Megalo's AIO, please message your ideas on Discord, as I would love to know about them.

If anyone wants to review my mod on YouTube, be my guest. 

 

== Credits ==

This Mod was created in line with Modding with Kaupenjoe's NeoForge 1.21.1 Tutorials.
All textures within the mod have been made by me since 2012. In talks with someone to update them for 2025/2026.

 

== DISCORD ==

The MegaloCraft Empire
